prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Deep beneath the shimmering waves, in a cozy nook lined with seashells and sea glass, lived a little octopus named Ollie. Ollie had eight wiggly arms, eyes as big as pearls, and a heart full of kindness—but he was terribly, wonderfully shy. Every time the other sea creatures zoomed by—giggling seahorses, chatty clownfish, even the jolly jellyfish—Ollie would tuck himself into a swirl of coral and watch from afar, wondering what it would be like to say hello... or maybe even share a game of hide-and-seek among the kelp!
